title: Nexus ListMemoryFragmentsQuery
description: Query parameters for GET /v1/local/memory/fragments. `keyword` is an optional case-insensitive LIKE filter; `limit` defaults to 50 (clamped 1..=250) when omitted.

world_id.description: Optional world projection filter. Omitted returns the whole Creator SOUL; present returns only fragments that emerged from this world. V1.81 has no public query value for core-only fragments.
